name: anicca — new tab
description: Your new tab as a live meditation on impermanence — the waking hours you still have, rendered as light against the dark.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com
